toolCall.name: run_command
toolCall.argumentsJson:
{"CommandLine":"# Download Discrete Mathematics FAT papers and other papers
$base = "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/puneet-chandna/VIT-PYQPs-Paaji/main/all%20papers/Discrete%20mathematics"
$dest = "D:\Study Papers\Joel\Discrete_Mathematics_and_Graph_Theory"

$fat = @(
    @("DMGT%20fat%20qp.pdf", "DMGT_FAT_qp.pdf"),
    @("DISCRETE%20MATHEMATICS%20AND%20GRAPH%20THEORY.pdf", "DMGT_Full_Paper.pdf"),
    @("Discrete%20BMAT205L%20D1.pdf", "Discrete_BMAT205L_D1.pdf"),
    @("Discrete%20Mathematics%20BMAT205L%20D1.pdf", "Discrete_Math_BMAT205L_D1.pdf"),
    @("Discrete%20Maths%20Graph%20Theory%20BMAT205L%20D1%20FAT.pdf", "DMGT_BMAT205L_D1_FAT.pdf"),
    @("discrete%20%20FAT%20question%20papers.pdf", "Discrete_FAT_qp_collection.pdf"),
    @("MAT%201014%20FAT%202K19.pdf", "MAT1014_FAT_2019.pdf"),
    @("MAT1014%20FAT%202K19.pdf", "MAT1014_FAT_2019_v2.pdf"),
    @("MAT1014%20FAT%202K19%20FALL%202K18.pdf", "MAT1014_FAT_2019_FALL2018.pdf"),
    @("MAT1014%20FAT%20FALL2019-20.pdf", "MAT1014_FAT_FALL2019-20.pdf")
)
foreach ($f in $fat) {
    Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "$base/$($f[0])" -OutFile "$dest\FAT\$($f[1])"
    Write-Host "Downloaded FAT: $($f[1])"
}

# Also download Smart Cities papers
$base2 = "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/puneet-chandna/VIT-PYQPs-Paaji/main/all%20papers/Design%20of%20Smart%20cities"
$dest2 = "D:\Study Papers\Joel\Design_of_Smart_Cities"

Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "$base2/Design%20of%20Smart%20cities%20CAT%201%20qp.pdf" -OutFile "$dest2\CAT1\Smart_Cities_CAT1_qp.pdf"
Write-Host "Downloaded: Smart Cities CAT 1"
Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "$base2/Design%20of%20smart%20cities%20CAT2%20qp.pdf" -OutFile "$dest2\CAT2\Smart_Cities_CAT2_qp.pdf"
Write-Host "Downloaded: Smart Cities CAT 2"
Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "$base2/design%20of%20smart%20cities%20Fat%20qp.pdf" -OutFile "$dest2\FAT\Smart_Cities_FAT_qp.pdf"
Write-Host "Downloaded: Smart Cities FAT"
Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "$base2/photo_2025-02-04_14-15-10.jpg" -OutFile "$dest2\CAT1\Smart_Cities_CAT_feb2025.jpg"
Write-Host "Downloaded: Smart Cities photo"

# Download Cloud Computing papers from PYQPs-Paaji
$base3 = "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/puneet-chandna/VIT-PYQPs-Paaji/main/all%20papers/Cloud%20Computing"
$dest3 = "D:\Study Papers\Joel\Cloud_Computing"

Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "$base3/Cloud%20CAT%201.pdf" -OutFile "$dest3\CAT1\Cloud_CAT1.pdf"
Write-Host "Downloaded: Cloud CAT 1"
Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "$base3/FAT%20Cloud%20F1.pdf" -OutFile "$dest3\FAT\Cloud_FAT_F1.pdf"
Write-Host "Downloaded: Cloud FAT F1"
Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "$base3/SYLLABUS_TH.pdf" -OutFile "$dest3\Notes\Cloud_Computing_Syllabus.pdf"
Write-Host "Downloaded: Cloud Computing Syllabus"

Write-Host "`nAll remaining papers downloaded!"","Cwd":"D:\","WaitMsBeforeAsync":10000,"toolAction":"Downloading FAT and remaining papers","toolSummary":"Batch FAT paper download"}
